title: [e2e] [runc?] exec: OCI runtime error: runc: exec failed: unable to start container process: error executing setns process
body:
Seen in the last week, Debian only, and only in my force-sqlite PR:
```
$ podman [options] exec 82fb2755b0501419753a128f5a18b424878c04761667be0ba1b75d4dfff3f012 mount
Error: OCI runtime error: runc: exec failed: unable to start container process: error executing setns process: exit status 1
```

* debian-12 : int podman debian-12 rootless host sqlite
  * PR #17831
    * [04-09 11:13](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5225944860852224/html/int-podman-debian-12-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--podman-pod-create-shm-size-systemd--1) in Podman pod create [It] podman pod create --shm-size-systemd
    * [04-09 11:13](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5225944860852224/html/int-podman-debian-12-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--podman-run-ipcns-ipcmk-container-test--1) in Podman run ns [It] podman run ipcns ipcmk container test
    * [04-07 15:59](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4636440936579072/html/int-podman-debian-12-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--podman-pod-create---shm-size-systemd--1) in Podman pod create [It] podman pod create --shm-size-systemd

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Closing: I think this was fixed in the ginkgov2 move.
